sessions.title: CXCDP-38893 closed — PR #29 regression coverage merged after CHUB review + thread resolve
sessions.summary: Closed out CXCDP-38893 by getting PR #29 merged into idx-cdp dev as commit 6e64de78. Workflow: rebased on dev (PR #28's fix), flipped 6 existing assertions from 'expect bug' to 'expect fix', added 4 new scenarios (heterogeneous siblings in category, mixed depth-1+depth-3, array-in-category-not-dropping-siblings, array-sibling-in-leaf), removed bug-class repro that passed identically on old and new code. Final test count: 10 in NestedPreferencesBugReproTest.java, all green. Yedidyah (I540109) approved same day. CHUB Bot flagged 4 review issues (2 moderate: diagnostic_printChildClasses no-assertion test + mixedDepth1AndDepth3 untethered scenario; 2 low: arrayInCategoryNode label vs actual coverage gap + FakeRecord null-return stubs). Replied with reasoning to all 4 inline, no code changes per user directive. Merge attempt failed with 405 'conversation must be resolved before merge' — discovered the repo rule requires explicit resolve_thread per thread, not just replies. Resolved all 4 threads via mcp__github-tools__pull_request_review_write method:resolve_thread, then merged successfully. Production verification re-run: pre-deploy 35,379 WARN/30d on Valio Oy → 0 post-deploy across all tenants on idx-cdp 1.0.2578. New memory: feedback-resolve-threads-before-merge documents the threadId resolve pattern. Session also did the GitHub PAT rotation (token expired email → new ghp_* in ~/.claude/settings.json line 13 githubToolsToken).

sessions.title: C4C V3 CloudEvents — all 3 sync listeners verified end-to-end + ApplicationService cleanup PR
sessions.summary: Closed the CloudEvents milestone for CXCDP-36055. Brendan confirmed C4C autoflow (Send Event Notification action) is the V3 sync mechanism — not Communication Configuration template per docs. Created UpsertCDPAccount autoflow rule + verified Contoso Corp name update propagated end-to-end. ContactSync needed its OWN Communication System (got 403 with shared OAuth despite docs). Hit + fixed: data.beforeImage=null on Create (oneOf null), recordsLocatorPath import validator (revert to $ — framework doesn't resolve $ref), code-list silent drops (LeaveAsIs vs Ignore), infinite loop between C4C and CDP (autoflow filter on dataContext.requestedByUser, stopped at 20 ingests). User verified IndivCustomerSync end-to-end. ContactSync mapping uses 3 target blocks (Profile + Org Relationship + Organization). Investigated ApplicationService /dataevents/odmevents hardcode — DataEventCredentialsServiceGrain.cs:38 + IsOdmWebhook trigger (configValues has businessPartnerType AND NOT messageType). Created sub-task CXCDP-39706 + draft PR #20 (commit 3f1dea3b, -53 lines, 6 files). Connector workaround: messageType config opts V3 listeners out of legacy URL without code deploy. Brendan confirmed relationships flow through Account+Contact events (no standalone CloudEvent); mapped hasContactPersons[] → Organization.contacts[] (NOT Org Relationship — per-Profile single-row, wrong target). Logged ~62h across 12 sub-tasks via Playwright Edge agents (had to discover playwright-2/3/4 fresh-profile MCPs after default playwright-1 stuck on Chrome). Filed CX Flow empty fieldCondition UX bug draft for Yedidyah. Demo invitation drafted. Memory: reference-c4c-v3-cloudevents-gotchas captures all the hard-won gotchas for QA handoff.
